case_title: VERNON ANTHONY FRISON VS. CSK AUTO, INC. DBA O'REILLY AUTO PARTS

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED MAY-08-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CSK AUTO, INC. DBA O'REILLY AUTO PARTS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CSK AUTO, INC. DBA O'REILLY AUTO PARTS

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CSK AUTO, INC. DBA O'REILLY AUTO PARTS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY IRA CORNELL--STORE MANAGER AND PATTY CARAVEZ--DISTRICT MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,869.65 FILED BY FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT CSK AUTO, INC. DBA O'REILLY AUTO PARTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CSK AUTO, INC. DBA O'REILLY AUTO PARTS $2,236.13 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,236.13, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $769.50, AN AMOUNT WHICH HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID BY DEFENDANT TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *(AGENT FOR SERVICE: CT CORP. SYS.)* FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT CSK AUTO, INC. DBA O'REILLY AUTO PARTS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT
